title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・希望こそ絶望

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto wins against T.M. Opera O. Air
Shakur considers it well within the margin of error.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears that Meisho Doto has yet to exceed
Opera O's capabilities, let alone the previous
generation's. The reason behind her stagnant rate
of growth is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Her reverence for T.M. Opera O. She respects her idol too much, and it's causing her to hold back against her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she doesn't start seeing her idol as a rival, the
future will remain bleak. She needs to realize this
before our next race, the Japan Cup.
